PackContext.description:
Context payload shared by slides.

Extra keys are allowed so packs can continue to pass arbitrary template values.

calculate.description: Deprecated alias for metrics.calculate; use context.metrics.calculate instead.
calculate.title: Calculate

metrics.description: Optional metric context bindings and scoping predicates.

PackContext.title: PackContext

PackEvidenceBindingsConfig.description: Binding selection rules for evidence exports.

select.description: Attribute keys that must exist in binding.metadata for selection.
select.title: Select

select_mode.description: Whether all select keys must exist (all) or any one (any).
select_mode.title: Select Mode

include.description: Binding IDs to force-include (unioned after select filtering).
include.title: Include

exclude.description: Binding IDs to force-exclude (removed after include union).
exclude.title: Exclude

PackEvidenceBindingsConfig.title: PackEvidenceBindingsConfig

PackEvidenceConfig.description:
Pack-level evidence export configuration.

When enabled, the pack runner exports `praeparo-metrics explain` artefacts for
selected visual bindings after slide execution completes.

enabled.description: Whether evidence exports run for this pack.
enabled.title: Enabled

output_dir.description: Directory under the pack artefact dir to store evidence exports (supports Jinja templates).
output_dir.title: Output Dir

when.description: When to execute evidence exports relative to the pack lifecycle.
when.title: When

on_error.description: Whether evidence failures fail the pack run (fail) or are recorded as warnings (warn).
on_error.title: On Error

explain.description: Evidence execution options mirroring praeparo-metrics explain.

PackEvidenceConfig.title: PackEvidenceConfig

PackEvidenceExplainConfig.description: Controls how evidence queries are planned and executed.

limit.description: Maximum rows to export for each evidence query.
limit.title: Limit

max_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent evidence exports (bounded to avoid overload).
max_concurrency.title: Max Concurrency

skip_existing.description: Skip evidence exports when a prior matching fingerprint is present in manifest.json.
skip_existing.title: Skip Existing

PackEvidenceExplainConfig.title: PackEvidenceExplainConfig

PackMetricBinding.description:
Binding describing how a metric value becomes a Jinja variable.

Bindings may reference a catalogue metric (`key` + optional `variant`) or declare an
arithmetic `expression` over other metrics/aliases. When `alias` is omitted it is
derived from the full metric key by replacing dots with underscores.

key.description: Catalogue metric key (e.g., documents_verified) or dotted variant key.
key.title: Key

alias.description: Jinja-safe variable name exposed to templates.
alias.title: Alias

variant.description: Optional variant path appended to `key` when `key` is not dotted.
variant.title: Variant

calculate.description: Optional DAX CALCULATE predicates for this binding. Named entries default to DEFINE scope; use calculate.<name>.evaluate to apply a predicate around the measure in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.

format.description: Optional formatting hint mirroring Praeparo format tokens.
format.title: Format

ratio_to.description: Optional ratio semantics for this binding. `true` ratios against the base metric inferred from the dotted key. A string value must be a catalogue metric key used as the denominator.
ratio_to.title: Ratio To

expression.description: Optional arithmetic expression referencing metric keys or aliases.
expression.title: Expression

override.description: True when intentionally shadowing an inherited alias.
override.title: Override

PackMetricBinding.title: PackMetricBinding

PackMetricsContext.description:
Metrics-only context for packs and slides.

This wrapper scopes DAX predicates to metric-context resolution without
affecting slide visuals.

calculate.description: Optional DAX CALCULATE predicates applied to metric-context execution. Shorthand entries default to DEFINE scope (outer dataset scoping). Use calculate.<name>.evaluate to apply calculation-group filters around every bound series in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.

bindings.description: Metric bindings resolved into Jinja variables.
bindings.title: Bindings

PackMetricsContext.title: PackMetricsContext

PackPlaceholder.description: Placeholder binding used by PPTX assembly.

image.description: Optional static image path for this placeholder, relative to the pack file.
image.title: Image

text.description: Plain text (optionally templated) injected into a named text shape.
text.title: Text

PackPlaceholder.title: PackPlaceholder

id.description: Optional stable identifier for the slide.
id.title: Id

context.description: Optional template context merged with the pack-level context.

calculate.description: Optional DAX filters applied to all visuals on the slide, merged after pack-level calculate filters and before visual-level overrides.
calculate.title: Calculate

visual.description: Optional visual reference; absent for non-visual slides.

template.description: Optional PPTX template identifier (TEMPLATE_TAG) used during deck assembly.
template.title: Template

placeholders.description: Optional placeholder map when a slide template contains multiple picture placeholders.
placeholders.title: Placeholders

image.description: Optional static image path when using a PPTX template without a visual.
image.title: Image

PackSlideContext.description: Context payload specific to an individual slide.

calculate.description: Deprecated alias for metrics.calculate; use context.metrics.calculate instead.
calculate.title: Calculate

metrics.description: Optional metric context bindings and scoping predicates.

PackSlideContext.title: PackSlideContext

PackSlideInsertOperation.description: Insert a new slide before or after an existing anchor slide id.

before.description: Anchor slide id for insertion before this slide.
before.title: Before

after.description: Anchor slide id for insertion after this slide.
after.title: After

PackSlideInsertOperation.title: PackSlideInsertOperation

PackSlideReplaceOperation.description: Replace an inherited slide by id.
PackSlideReplaceOperation.title: PackSlideReplaceOperation

PackSlideUpdateOperation.description: Patch an inherited slide by id.
PackSlideUpdateOperation.title: PackSlideUpdateOperation

PackVisualRef.description: Reference to a visual or an inline visual config plus optional slide-level overrides.

ref.description: Optional path to the visual definition relative to the pack file.
ref.title: Ref

type.description: Optional inline visual type or Python module path when embedding a config directly.
type.title: Type

filters.description: Optional OData filters applied on top of pack-level defaults.
filters.title: Filters

calculate.description: Optional DAX filters applied on top of pack-level defaults.
calculate.title: Calculate

PackVisualRef.title: PackVisualRef

ScopedCalculateEntry.description: Named calculate entry split between DEFINE and EVALUATE scopes.

define.description: Predicates applied in the DEFINE scope.
define.title: Define

evaluate.description: Predicates applied in the EVALUATE scope (around measures in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS).
evaluate.title: Evaluate

ScopedCalculateEntry.title: ScopedCalculateEntry

ScopedCalculateFilters.description: Split calculate predicates between DEFINE and EVALUATE scopes.
ScopedCalculateFilters.title: ScopedCalculateFilters

ScopedCalculateMap.description:
Named calculate map with per-scope merge helpers.

This model is used for `context.metrics.calculate` at both pack root and slide
scope so root definitions automatically apply to slide metric-context runs.
ScopedCalculateMap.title: ScopedCalculateMap

description: Root configuration for a pack composed of slides.

schema.description: Schema or contract identifier for the pack.
schema.title: Schema

extends.description: Optional parent pack path resolved relative to this pack file.
extends.title: Extends

define.description: Optional DAX DEFINE block applied to DAX-backed visuals.
define.title: Define

calculate.description: Pack-level DAX filters applied to DAX-backed visuals.
calculate.title: Calculate

filters.description: Pack-level OData filters applied to Power BI visuals.
filters.title: Filters

evidence.description: Optional evidence export configuration executed after pack completion.

slides_remove.description: Optional inherited slide ids to remove (requires extends).
slides_remove.title: Slides Remove

slides_replace.description: Optional slide replacements by id (requires extends).
slides_replace.title: Slides Replace

slides_update.description: Optional slide patches by id (requires extends).
slides_update.title: Slides Update

slides_insert.description: Optional slide inserts anchored before/after an existing id (requires extends).
slides_insert.title: Slides Insert
